message:
fix: handle nested C extension module calls in emit-logic-table

- Add generateNestedCExtensionCall() to dispatch.zig for calls like
  np.linalg.norm() -> c_interop.callModuleFunction("numpy.linalg", "norm", ...)
- Update emit-logic-table header to include runtime/c_interop imports
  and __global_allocator definition for standalone logic_table modules
